action.reasoning: Starting from scratch. I need to build a complete HMER pipeline: CNN encoder (DenseNet121 pretrained) + Transformer decoder. First iteration goal: validate end-to-end pipeline with a short 3-epoch training run, then submit eval to measure iteration time and get a baseline exprate. I will use AMP for speed, dynamic batch padding, and label smoothing.
action.command: python train.py --epochs 3 --batch_size 32 --img_height 160 && echo "=== predict smoke test ===" && python predict.py --data_path /data/val --checkpoint checkpoints/best.pt --output val_preds.json && head -n 20 val_preds.json
